jobs.title: Account Development Manager

location.name: San Francisco, CA, New York, NY, Portland, OR, or Remote within United States

jobs.content: <p>Railroads didn&#39;t change the world because tracks were laid once. The steam locomotive existed for decades before it transformed commerce. What changed everything was the expansion of connected networks: routes multiplied, standards emerged, and usage deepened over time.</p><p>Mercury&rsquo;s mission is similar — more than 300,000 ambitious businesses already rely on Mercury to run their finances on Mercury Checking, Mercury Savings, Mercury Treasury, and Mercury Credit.</p>

jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer, Mercury IO
jobs.content: <p>Build the Mercury IO API platform that thousands of vertical-SaaS partners run on Mercury&rsquo;s ledger — the ACH / wire / RTP rails, the BSA-AML transaction-screening pipeline, and the audit-trail generator the compliance team opens every Friday.</p>
